tooltip.extractor: Place an Extractor — emits a numeric token every N ticks
tooltip.conveyor: Place a Conveyor — routes tokens in one direction
tooltip.eraser: Remove any entity from the grid
tooltip.DIV: DIV operator — outputs a ÷ b (drops token if b = 0)
tooltip.MOD: MOD operator — outputs a mod b (drops token if b = 0)
tooltip.GCD: GCD operator — outputs the greatest common divisor of a and b
tooltip.SQRT: SQRT operator — outputs √a (drops token if a < 0)
tooltip.FACTOR: FACTOR operator — outputs all prime factors of a as separate tokens
tooltip.IS_PRIME: IS_PRIME operator — outputs 1 if a is prime, otherwise 0

step1.title: Welcome to calc-o-matic!
step1.body: Build factory lines that process numbers. Route tokens through math operators to hit the target value at the Receiver.

step2.title: Placing Components
step2.body: Select a tool from the toolbar on the left. Click any empty grid tile to place it. Right-click a Conveyor to rotate it.

step3.title: Your First Puzzle
step3.body: An Extractor is already placed — connect it to the Receiver with Conveyor belts. Hit Start when you're ready!

errors.outOfBounds: Cannot place outside the grid boundary.
errors.noConnection: This component has no valid connection.
